elements.name: Verify onboarding screens and navigate to login

steps.name: the app is launched
Verify the "Digitization" screen is displayed
the user clicks on Next
Verify the "World of Machines" screen should be displayed
the user clicks on Next again
Verify the "Accelerating Growth" screen should displayed
the user clicks on Finish
Verify the "Login to Your Account" screen should be visible
the user double taps on the APMS AI footer if needed

elements.name: Verify user is able to login successfully

steps.name: the user is on the login screen
the user enters email "anilkumar.m@apms.ai"
the user enters password "1234"
the user clicks on Login
Verify the user should be logged in successfully
User clicks on profile icon
User clicks on "Configurations" section
User clicks on "Operators" feature

elements.name: Navigate to Operators list screen

steps.name: User clicks on profile icon
verify that the "Account Preferences" screen is displayed
User clicks on "Configurations" section
verify the "User" section is displayed
User clicks on "Operators" feature
verify user navigates to "Operators" list screen
Operators list should be displayed
Add "+" button should be visible in Operators list
User clicks on profile icon
User clicks on "Configurations" section
User clicks on "Operators" feature

elements.name: Open Add New Operator screen and verify all fields

steps.name: User clicks on "+ Add" button in Operators list screen
"Add New Operator" screen should be displayed
Operator Name field should be visible
Email ID field should be visible
Operator Phone No field should be visible
Emergency No field should be visible
Operator Code field should be visible
Blood Group dropdown should be visible
DOB field should be visible
DOJ field should be visible
Address Line I field should be visible
Address Line II field should be visible
Pin Code field should be visible
City field should be visible
State field should be visible
Country field should be visible
Submit button should be visible in Add New Operator screen
User clicks back arrow in Add New Operator screen
Operator should be navigate into "Operators" list
User clicks on profile icon
User clicks on "Configurations" section
User clicks on "Operators" feature

elements.name: Create Operator with mandatory fields only

steps.name: User clicks on "+ Add" button in Operators list screen
"Add New Operator" screen should be displayed
User enters valid Operator Name
User enters valid Operator Phone No
User selects Blood Group from dropdown
User clicks Submit button in Add New Operator screen
Operator should be created successfully
User clicks on search icon
User taps on search input field
User clears existing text in search field
User enters newly created Operator Name
User waits for search results to load
system should display matching Operator results
User verifies Operator appears in list
User clicks search close X button
search field should be closed
module list should be in normal state
Operator should be navigate into "Operators" list
User clicks on profile icon
User clicks on "Configurations" section
User clicks on "Operators" feature
